home.heroTitle: Real family cuisine in the heart of Cruzeiro do Oeste
home.heroSubtitle: Traditional flavors · Family atmosphere · Easy reservation
home.welcomeTitle: The taste you know, the attention you deserve
home.welcomeText: For over 5 years, Saveur de la Terre has been the meeting point for families in Cruzeiro do Oeste. Here you'll find that good home cooking, made with care, that reminds you of Sunday lunch at grandma's.
home.familyCuisineDesc: Made fresh, every day, with fresh ingredients
home.familyAmbianceDesc: Cozy space where the whole family feels at home
home.privateParkingDesc: Secure spaces, easy access to downtown
home.noFavorites: No favorite dishes at the moment
home.firstReview: Be the first to leave a review
home.ctaText: Reserve your table now and discover why we are the favorite restaurant of families

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.subtitle: A family passion turned tradition
ourStory.story1Text: The story of Saveur de la Terre begins long before 2019. For over 25 years, Dona Maria Helena Silva prepared lunches in her own home for friends and family.
ourStory.story2Text: One day, her son Carlos suggested: "Mom, why not share your talent with the whole city?" The idea took root, and in 2019, Saveur de la Terre opened its doors.
ourStory.story2Quote: Mom, why not share your talent with the whole city?
ourStory.story3Text: What started as a small restaurant with only 8 tables has become the favorite meeting place for families in Cruzeiro do Oeste.
ourStory.story3Bold: favorite meeting place for families in Cruzeiro do Oeste
ourStory.mainQuote: Real cooking, made with love, so you feel at home
ourStory.year2019Desc: Opening of the restaurant with 8 tables and a big dream
ourStory.year2020Desc: Expansion to 20 tables due to success
ourStory.year2022Desc: Best Family Restaurant Award in the region
ourStory.familyDesc: Warm atmosphere where everyone is welcome
ourStory.qualityDesc: Fresh and local ingredients selected daily
